onboarding.title: One last step! 🎉
onboarding.subtitle: Your account is ready. Add Wassel to Chrome to start importing prospects from LinkedIn.

onboarding.securedOAuth: 🔒 100% secured via LinkedIn OAuth — we never store your password
onboarding.whyConnect: Why do we need LinkedIn connection?
benefits: Track invitation acceptance in real time
onboarding.installExtensionDesc: The extension works directly from your browser to automate your LinkedIn outreach. You can install it later from the dashboard.
installSteps: Return to this page — detection is automatic
onboarding.searchingExtension: 🔍 Searching for extension automatically... If installed, it will appear here.
onboarding.oneStepDesc: Connect your LinkedIn account and start automating your outreach in 2 minutes.

extensionPage.title: Install Wassel Chrome Extension
extensionPage.subtitle: The Chrome extension is required to import prospects from LinkedIn and run campaigns.

features.invites: 🤝 Send invites & messages on your behalf

extension.requiredCampaign: To launch a campaign, you need the Wassel Chrome Extension installed. It executes LinkedIn actions on your behalf.
extension.requiredPost: To publish a LinkedIn post, you need the Wassel Chrome Extension installed.
extension.notRequired: The extension is not required for prospect discovery. Apify handles that.

dashboard.subtitle: Here's an overview of your campaigns and outreach activity.

campaigns.noStepsDesc: This campaign has no sequence steps. Create a new campaign to set up steps.

features.title: Everything you need to scale outreach

sequences.name: Smart Sequences

import.name: Prospect Import
import.desc: Import leads directly from LinkedIn search in one click via our Chrome extension.

analytics.name: Real-Time Analytics
analytics.desc: Track acceptance rates, reply rates, and funnel drop-off across every campaign.

safe.name: Safe Automation
safe.desc: Built-in rate limits and human-like delays keep your LinkedIn account protected.

sync.name: Connection Sync
sync.desc: Auto-detects when invites are accepted and unlocks the next message instantly.

team.name: Team Management
team.desc: Invite your team, manage seats, and monitor all campaigns from one admin view.
